subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory befit the branches of the divine Lote-Tree, whom neither the hosts of idle fancies nor the ranks of vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا افنان سدره الهیه را لایق و سزاست که جنود ظنون و صفوف اوهام ایشانرا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
